title: bromus sterilis var. nudus
intro: Bromus sterilis var. nudus, also known as smooth brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of smooth brome are attributed to its high content of fiber and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive problems, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Smooth brome can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried plant material in hot water, or it can be used as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules or tablets.
